Class PreProcessorInputStream

java.lang.Object
java.io.InputStream
org.apache.axis2.corba.idl.PreProcessorInputStream
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable
public class PreProcessorInputStream extends InputStream
